verify_page.success_description: Your account has been verified. You can now use the app.
verify_page.error_description: The verification link is invalid or has expired.

welcome: How can I help you today?
no-conversations: You don't have any conversations yet
toaster-new-chat: You are already in a new chat
toaster-rate-limit: Too many requests. Please try again later.
toaster-generic-error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

toaster.onboarding-complete: Great! Tutorial complete. Enjoy using the app!

editProjectInstructions.sub-header: Add or update your project description
editProjectInstructions.placeholder: For example: I'm developing an SMM campaign for Supercell...

addProject.sub-header: Enter a name for your new project

renameProject.new-title: Enter a new name for this project

removeProject.message: This action is irreversible. You are deleting the project  «{ projectTitle }» from the servers.

removeDialog.message: This action is irreversible. You are deleting the dialogue information «{ dialogTitle }» from the servers.

general: You can attach images and documents to your messages
Try asking follow-up questions for deeper insights
I can help with code, writing, analysis, and more
You can edit your previous messages
Click the copy button to save code snippets
I remember our entire conversation context
You can start a new chat anytime from the menu
Swipe left on a message to see more options
coding: I can explain code in multiple programming languages
Ask me to optimize your code for better performance
I can help debug errors - just paste the error message
Need tests? I can write unit tests for your code
I support syntax highlighting for 100+ languages
Ask me to review your code for best practices
I can convert code between different languages
Describe what you want, and I'll write the code
I can help with regex patterns and SQL queries
Ask me to explain complex algorithms step by step
productivity: I can summarize long documents for you
Ask me to help brainstorm ideas on any topic
I can help you write emails and letters
Need a plan? I can create detailed outlines
I can translate text between languages
Ask me to proofread and improve your writing
I can help with research and fact-checking
Need to learn something new? I'm a great tutor
features: Premium users get access to advanced models
File attachments help me understand your context better
I can analyze images and extract text from them
Voice messages are supported - just click the mic
Export our conversation anytime you need
Dark mode is available in settings
You can search through all your conversations
I support markdown formatting in responses
fun: I process text 10x faster than human reading speed
My training included millions of documents
I can speak over 50 languages fluently
I learn from patterns, not memorization
Each response is uniquely generated for you
I can maintain context across long conversations
I'm powered by advanced transformer architecture
I can understand context and nuance in language
I never get tired - available 24/7 for you
